title: Feature: Dashboard visibility overhaul — fix broken views, project-centric nav, task drill-down, inbox panel

steps.description: Fix health ring: read astIsStub from project data, show warning banner + gray ring when true instead of fake 100/100 score. Fix in health pane component.
steps.done_condition: Health ring shows warning state when astIsStub=true; real scores render normally

steps.description: Fix graph layer colors: add primary adapter (orange) and secondary adapter (blue) to LAYER_COLORS map. Ensure all node types have distinct colors.
steps.done_condition: Graph nodes for adapters/primary/ and adapters/secondary/ render with distinct non-gray colors

steps.description: Project-scope Agent Fleet: filter agents by selected project's project_id using entityBelongsToProject() utility. Show remote vs local grouping. Add host column.
steps.done_condition: Agent Fleet shows only agents matching selected project; remote agents (different host) visually distinguished

steps.description: Remove legacy index.html. Update serve_index in hex-nexus embed.rs to serve the SolidJS dashboard SPA for root URL. Redirect /chat to SPA chat route.
steps.done_condition: GET / serves SolidJS dashboard; GET /chat redirects to SPA; legacy index.html removed

steps.description: Add Inbox notification panel component. Subscribe to agent_inbox SpacetimeDB table filtered by project agents. Render unacked notifications with priority styling. Ack button calls PATCH /api/hexflo/inbox/{id}/ack.
steps.done_condition: Inbox panel shows notifications for project agents; priority 2 has red styling; ack button works

steps.description: Add task drill-down in swarm monitor. Clicking a task expands to show: assigned agent (name, host, status from HexAgent), worktree path, and recent commits via REST /api/{project}/git/log.
steps.done_condition: Clicking a swarm task shows agent details + worktree + commits in expanded row

steps.description: Link WorkPlan view to ADR: read 'adr' field from workplan JSON, render as clickable link that navigates to ADR browser filtered to that ADR. Show executing swarm if swarm_id matches.
steps.done_condition: Workplan view shows linked ADR badge; clicking navigates to ADR browser

steps.description: Add SpacetimeDB connection status banner. When WebSocket disconnects, show reconnecting banner across all views. When reconnected, dismiss automatically.
steps.done_condition: Disconnecting SpacetimeDB shows banner; reconnecting clears it; views don't break

steps.description: Security: validate path in /api/{project}/tokens/{file} endpoint — reject paths containing '..' or absolute paths. Return 400.
steps.done_condition: GET /api/{project}/tokens/../../etc/passwd returns 400; normal paths still work

steps.description: Integration test: rebuild hex-nexus with asset changes, verify all fixed views render correctly via Playwright or manual browser test. Check project-scoped agents, inbox panel, health warning, graph colors.
steps.done_condition: All views render correctly; no console errors; inbox notifications visible; health ring accurate

mergeOrder: step-1, step-2, step-3, step-4, step-9 parallel (tier 0 — independent fixes)
step-5, step-6, step-7, step-8 parallel (tier 1 — new components, depend on step-3 for project scoping)

riskRegister.risk: Removing index.html breaks bookmarks/scripts pointing to /
riskRegister.mitigation: Serve SolidJS app at / — same URL, different content. No redirect needed.

riskRegister.risk: agent_inbox table not in SpacetimeDB auto-generated client bindings
riskRegister.mitigation: Regenerate SpacetimeDB client bindings after publishing updated hexflo-coordination module

riskRegister.risk: Vite dev vs rust-embed asset mismatch
riskRegister.mitigation: Develop with Vite HMR at :5173; only cargo build for final validation

successCriteria: Developer can see all agents working on their project from the dashboard
Developer can click a failed swarm task and see the agent, worktree, and commits
Inbox notifications from ADR-060 are visible in the dashboard without CLI
Health ring shows accurate state (warning when stub, real score when analyzed)
No legacy HTML pages — single SolidJS SPA serves all routes
